title: pepinia corallina
intro: Pepinia corallina, also known as the coral pea or coral vine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infection. The health benefits of Pepinia corallina include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into a topical cream or ointment to apply directly to affected areas, or used as a tea to support overall health and well-being.
